title: Ubiquiti UACC-OFC-MA-MPMP-10M - fiber patch cable MPO-12 Type B UPC, Multi-mode OM4, 10m
category: Ubiquiti / Optical networks / Patch cords / Multi Mode
description: The Ubiquiti UACC-OFC-MA-MPMP is an optical patch cord with MPO / UPC connectors on both ends. It features OM4-type multimode fibers with a pink 3mm jacket made from LSZH material The patch cord is available in lengths of 0.5, 1, 3, 5, 10, 15, 30, 60, and 100 meters and it is suitable for 100G applications
